scripts.build:wasm: cd ../crate && rustup run nightly wasm-pack build . --target web --out-dir ../example/wasm --features gpu
scripts.build:wasm:threaded: cd ../crate && RUSTFLAGS='-C target-feature=+atomics,+bulk-memory,+mutable-globals' rustup run nightly wasm-pack build . --target web --out-dir ../example/wasm --features wasm-threads,gpu -Z build-std=std,panic_abort
